overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beachfront promenade on a sunny day. The character transitions from the paved walkway past beachfront buildings and onto the sandy beach, approaching the pier with a Ferris wheel in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront pedestrian promenade with shops and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved promenade past various pedestrians and beachfront buildings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing on stairs near a building entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
multi-story buildings with shops and apartments facing the beach
concrete benches for seating along the walkway
tall building with large pink Del Perro signage and arched windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide concrete promenade on a sunny beachfront. Palm trees line the left side while colorful beachfront buildings stand on the right. The Del Perro building becomes visible ahead as the character moves forward through sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway passing the Del Perro building and large exhibition hall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade with character appearance changing to gray shirt, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large white building with multiple columns and arched windows resembling an exhibition hall
residential buildings with fire escapes and balconies

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront path, passing the Del Perro building which recedes into the distance. A large columned building comes into view on the left while the beach becomes more visible on the right. The character model changes appearance during this segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy beach approaching the pier

events.description: character steps off the paved promenade onto the sandy beach

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the pier with the ocean visible ahead

entered.detail: expansive white sand beach with footprints
long wooden pier extending into the ocean with buildings on top
large white Ferris wheel at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from pavement to sand and walks across the open beach toward Del Perro Pier. The Ferris wheel and pier structure grow larger as the character approaches. The beach is mostly empty with only a few distant figures visible near the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny beachfront promenade that gradually transitions from a paved urban walkway to the open sands of the coast. It begins with the character walking along a wide concrete path lined with palm trees and colorful buildings, moving forward as the Del Perro building comes into view. As the character continues, the Del Perro building recedes and a large columned structure appears on the left while the beach opens up further to the right. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the pavement behind to walk across the open sand, with the distant Ferris wheel and pier structure growing larger in the frame. Finally, the camera follows the character across the mostly empty beach toward the looming architecture of the pier.
